name: liminal-agents
description: Three-agent deliberation plugin for Claude Code. Architect, Witness, and Contrarian read your psychological state, disagree by design, and your correction becomes data.
author: Shruti Rajagopal <shruti@theliminalspace.io>

scripts.vault:show: sqlite3 ~/.liminal-agents-vault.db 'SELECT id, timestamp, user_state, correction_agent FROM deliberations ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;'
